creator: umeno@rr.iij4u.or.jp
text:
I approve this patch, because this send-pr is sent by myself.
Sorry, I forgot to rewrite mail address.

From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.ORG>
Subject: Re: ports/101615: Maintainer Update: change mastersites of games/gnomekiss
Date: Mon, 7 Aug 2006 22:30:48 UT

> Maintainer of games/gnomekiss,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/101615 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/101615
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
